name: Almond Butter Cookies (Sandwiched with Jam)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine the ground almonds and sugar.
3. Add the melted butter (from 2 sticks) to the mixture and blend well.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour and salt), mixing until a dough forms.
5. Stir in the water and mix until the dough is smooth.
6. Shape the dough into a flattened ball and wrap it in parchment paper.
7. Chill the dough for at least 1/2 hour.
8. Roll out the chilled dough on a lightly floured surface until it is about 1/4-inch thick.
9. Cut the dough into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
10. Place the cookies about 2 inches apart on a parchment-covered baking sheet.
11. Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 12-15 minutes.
12. Allow the cookies to cool completely before assembling with strained or seedless jam (raspberry is great!) or chocolate ganache.
Yield: 5 dozen Sandwich Cookies
